transaction_initiated.template: IDLR-PTS: Transaction {{transactionId}} initiated for parcel {{parcelId}}. Amount: {{currency}}{{amount}}. Track status at {{shortUrl}}

transaction_approved.template: IDLR-PTS: Great news! Transaction {{transactionId}} has been APPROVED. View details at {{shortUrl}}

transaction_completed.template: IDLR-PTS: Transaction {{transactionId}} COMPLETED successfully! Blockchain hash: {{shortHash}}. Certificate available at {{shortUrl}}

transaction_rejected.template: IDLR-PTS: Transaction {{transactionId}} was REJECTED. Reason: {{shortReason}}. Details at {{shortUrl}}

verification_submitted.template: IDLR-PTS: Verification request {{requestId}} submitted for parcel {{parcelId}}. Expected review: {{reviewTime}}. Track at {{shortUrl}}

verification_approved.template: IDLR-PTS: Verification {{requestId}} APPROVED! Certificate {{certificateNumber}} ready. Download at {{shortUrl}}

verification_rejected.template: IDLR-PTS: Verification {{requestId}} REJECTED. Reason: {{shortReason}}. Resubmit with corrections. Details at {{shortUrl}}

payment_reminder.template: IDLR-PTS: Payment reminder for transaction {{transactionId}}. Amount: {{currency}}{{amount}}. Due: {{dueDate}}. Pay at {{shortUrl}}

document_expiring.template: IDLR-PTS: Your document {{documentType}} for parcel {{parcelId}} expires on {{expiryDate}}. Renew at {{shortUrl}}

appointment_reminder.template: IDLR-PTS: Appointment reminder for {{appointmentType}} on {{date}} at {{time}}. Location: {{location}}. Confirm at {{shortUrl}}
